description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner with a printed fabric or vinyl display mounted on a sturdy metal base. The front face features a black background with white and red text, including a prominent portrait sketch and the name 'Miguel Hernández' at the top. The main section welcomes attendees to a conference, listing event details and sponsor logos at the bottom. The banner is supported by a wide, flat metal base with two stabilizing feet extending perpendicular to the main axis. The rear view shows the reverse side of the printed material, with the text and image mirrored. The structure is slim and lightweight, designed for easy transport and setup at events or public spaces.
description: A vertical freestanding event banner with a black printed face, metal base, and stabilizing feet, displaying conference information and sponsor logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the banner and the flat metal base with two stabilizing feet.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full printed design, including the portrait, event title, and sponsor logos.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness and the support structure of the base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the mirrored print of the banner and the supporting frame structure.
attribute_banner_content: event name and details, portrait sketch, sponsor logos
